title: cyclone/pink~

methods.description: a float sets seed, no float sets a unique internal

body: [pink~] generates pink noise. This is not an actual MAX clone but an object that is borrowed from ELSE which has more functionalities and is backwards compatible to MAX's object since the original just outputs pink noise! White noise has constant spectral power, but pink noise has constant power per octave and it decrease 3dB per octave.
